prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.9 kg; Height 160.1 cm; BMI 30.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 9.5%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 9.9%), FPG (12 months ago 200mg/dL; 9 months ago 227mg/dL; 6 months ago 237mg/dL; 3 months ago 216mg/dL; current 241mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 77.9kg; 9 months ago 78.8kg; 6 months ago 77.9kg; 3 months ago 76.8kg; current 77.9kg), Height (12 months ago 160.1cm; 9 months ago 160.1cm; 6 months ago 160.1cm; 3 months ago 160.1cm; current 160.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 81mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 9.0U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 32U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 27U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 18mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; current 17mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 320mg/g; 9 months ago 352mg/g; 6 months ago 552mg/g; 3 months ago 609mg/g; current 490mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 97mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 139mg/dL; 9 months ago 142mg/dL; 6 months ago 140mg/dL; 3 months ago 125mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.4g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
